Positive_words_Beige_Before.description: Number of positive words from Beige party MPs surveyed before the election. Same response variable as Positive_words_Grey_Before, Positive_words_Beige_After, and Positive_words_Grey_After, grouped by party (Beige) and timing (Before).

Positive_words_Grey_Before.description: Number of positive words from Grey party MPs surveyed before the election. Same response variable as Positive_words_Beige_Before, Positive_words_Beige_After, and Positive_words_Grey_After, grouped by party (Grey) and timing (Before).

Positive_words_Beige_After.description: Number of positive words from Beige party MPs surveyed after the election. Same response variable as Positive_words_Beige_Before, Positive_words_Grey_Before, and Positive_words_Grey_After, grouped by party (Beige) and timing (After).

Positive_words_Grey_After.description: Number of positive words from Grey party MPs surveyed after the election. Same response variable as Positive_words_Beige_Before, Positive_words_Grey_Before, and Positive_words_Beige_After, grouped by party (Grey) and timing (After).

Party.description: Political party factor with two levels: Beige and Grey. One of the two factors in the two-way ANOVA.

Timing.description: Timing factor indicating whether the survey was conducted before or after the general election. One of the two factors in the two-way ANOVA.
